articles.title: Bengaluru man saved after posting ‘last day’ status on WhatsApp; police act in four minutes after being alerted on Namma 112 helpline
articles.description: A friend who saw the status immediately alerted the Namma 112 Emergency Helpline; police found the 28-year-old man lying unconscious on the floor.

articles.title: At least 32 injured as bus carrying policemen collides with container truck in Kerala
articles.description: According to police, the bus was carrying personnel of the Malabar Special Police (MSP) who were returning to their base after election duty at around 12.30 am.

topStories.title: Iran's ‘Minab 168’ delegation brings blood-soaked school bags, pictures of school strike victims on flight to Pakistan
topStories.description: The Iranian delegation, led by Speaker Mohammad Bagher Ghalibaf, is named ‘Minab 168,’ after the school children killed in US-Israel strikes on the first day of the war.

topStories.title: From a DMK campaigner and fan of MGR to renowned littérateur
topStories.description: Kalapriya says that before joining the DMK, MGR was associated with the Congress. Over the time, he surrounded himself with seasoned political minds, including communist leaders K.  Baladhandayutham  and  Kalyanasundaram. He was further supported by experienced figures such as K.A. Krishnaswamy  and Panruti S. Ramachandran. This combination of cinematic influence and political acumen gave him an exceptional grasp of governance as well as mass psychology.

topStories.title: Why JD Vance Is Leading US Side In Talks With Iran
topStories.description: Reports suggest Vance was handpicked to lead the talks to fulfil a wish from Tehran.

topStories.title: Russia and Ukraine set to begin Easter truce
topStories.description: The temporary ceasefire came as US-led talks on ending the four-year-old conflict have been derailed by the Middle East war. The two sides also held a ceasefire for the Orthodox Easter last year.

topStories.title: Concerns after satellite provider restricts Iran images following US pressure
topStories.description: Planet Labs says it is restricting coverage of Iran and parts of the Middle East indefinitely.

topStories.description: Ray Dalio says control of the Strait of Hormuz may decide U.S.Iran conflict outcome.

topStories.description: Farmers, who sustain the nation through their hard work, are being treated like criminals in the grain markets. It is as if they have arrived carrying illicit goods rather than their harvested crops,” Bhupinder Singh Hooda said

dailyNews.description: The president has proposed the arch, which would rise on a Washington roundabout across from the Lincoln Memorial, as a way to celebrate America’s 250th anniversary.

dailyNews.description: President Trump said in an interview that he had known his wife wanted to address rumors about the late sex offender at some point, but that he had not known exactly what she would say.

dailyNews.title: Potential Democratic 2028 Candidates Condemn Trump’s ‘War of Choice’ in Iran
dailyNews.description: At a convention in New York, several Democrats mulling presidential bids rallied around opposition to President Trump’s decision to attack Iran.

dailyNews.title: Burned Before, Democrats Abruptly Revive the Idea of Impeaching Trump
dailyNews.description: Democrats in Congress have assiduously avoided talk of a third impeachment of President Trump, concerned that it would distract from their midterm campaign message. That tide seems to have turned.

dailyNews.title: Trump Moves Top Aide James Blair to Political Operation Ahead of Midterms
dailyNews.description: Mr. Blair will “lead the charge from the outside,” the president said on social media. The move comes as Republicans are bracing for a potentially difficult November election.

dailyNews.title: A Republican Strategist Explains What’s Going On With the Party
dailyNews.description: Without Trump on the midterms ballot, how will his party fare?

dailyNews.title: Trump proposes covering executive office building's stone facade with white paint
dailyNews.description: The building sits across a driveway from the West Wing and was completed in 1888.

dailyNews.title: Planned "Arc de Trump" would be over twice as high as Lincoln Memorial
dailyNews.description: Plans submitted by the Interior Department show the triumphal arch would be 250 feet tall, the tallest triumphal arch in the world.

dailyNews.title: First lady Melania Trump slams "baseless lies" tying her to Jeffrey Epstein
dailyNews.description: First lady Melania Trump delivered a televised statement denying a relationship with the late sex offender Jeffrey Epstein.

dailyNews.title: Trump praises Palantir as stock has worst week in over a year and Iran conflict drags on
dailyNews.description: Palantir's Maven platform have reportedly been used in the U.S. military campaign in Iran.

dailyNews.title: Trump policies, China's biotech boom are ending Europe's pharma powerhouse era
dailyNews.description: Companies have long lamented Europe's fragmented capital markets, single-market adoption on pricing and clinical trials, and uneven reimbursement policies.

dailyNews.title: U.S. oil slips below $100 as Trump demands reopening of Strait of Hormuz
dailyNews.description: U.S. President Donald Trump on Thursday warned Iran to "stop now" if it was charging tankers to transit the Strait of Hormuz.
